app_release_notes: v1.1.0 - New Compare Loads page: pick saved loads from the same rifle and see which powder and charge shot best, scored on velocity SD, mean radius, and vertical SD. Plus Library cleanup: delete saved loads, bullets, rifles, and barrels you no longer want.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.1.0 - New Compare Loads page: pick saved loads from the same rifle and see which powder and charge shot best, scored on velocity SD, mean radius, and vertical SD. Plus Library cleanup: delete saved loads, bullets, rifles, and barrels you no longer want.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.0.6 - A much bigger bullet library: hundreds of current match and hunting bullets added across .22 through .338, each with a sourced ballistic coefficient. Also more accurate predicted DOPE when two bullets share the same name and weight in different calibers.
